critical_issues.title: All inventory items showing expired status with negative days to expiry
critical_issues.root_cause: System date configuration error or data timestamp mismatch causing all items to appear 344-371 days past expiry. This indicates inventory data is from 2024 or earlier, not current 2025-01 period.
critical_issues.impact: ₹69,165 total inventory at risk if data is accurate
critical_issues.recommendation: Immediately audit physical inventory against system records. Verify system date settings and data import timestamps. If items are truly expired, dispose of all perishable items (₹46,540 value) immediately and investigate procurement/usage tracking failures.

critical_issues.title: Critical stock levels on multiple high-value proteins
critical_issues.root_cause: Chicken Breast (18 units vs 80 max), Pork Belly (9 vs 50), Lamb Shoulder (8 vs 30), and Goan Chorizo (7 vs 30) all near or below reorder levels, indicating inadequate procurement planning or supply chain issues.
critical_issues.impact: Risk of menu item stockouts affecting revenue
critical_issues.recommendation: Implement automated reorder triggers at reorder levels. Place emergency orders for all proteins below 150% of reorder level. Review supplier lead times and adjust reorder points accordingly.

critical_issues.title: Dangerously low specialty condiments inventory
critical_issues.root_cause: Bhut Jolokia Oil (2 units vs 8 max), Arugula (5 vs 20), Cheesecake Base Mix (5 vs 20) at critical levels. These specialty items likely have longer procurement lead times.
critical_issues.impact: Potential menu limitations and customer dissatisfaction
critical_issues.recommendation: Establish safety stock for specialty items equal to 2-week usage. Identify alternative suppliers for faster procurement. Consider menu engineering to reduce dependency on hard-to-source items.

critical_issues.title: Missing critical operational data for analysis period
critical_issues.root_cause: No sales, order, or operational metrics data provided for January 2025, preventing assessment of kitchen efficiency, revenue performance, or waste patterns.
critical_issues.impact: Unable to quantify actual operational losses
critical_issues.recommendation: Implement daily data collection protocols for orders, sales, kitchen times, and waste. Deploy POS integration to automatically capture transaction data. Establish daily/weekly reporting dashboards.

critical_issues.title: Poor inventory turnover indicated by low stock levels across board
critical_issues.root_cause: Most items at 12-30% of max capacity suggests either over-conservative ordering, declining sales, or recent major waste event. Current stock value of ₹69,165 is likely below optimal operational levels.
critical_issues.recommendation: Analyze sales velocity for past 3 months. Adjust par levels based on actual usage patterns. If sales have declined, conduct market analysis and promotional campaigns. Increase stock to 60-70% of max capacity for high-velocity items.
